name: Taylor Eigsti
abstract: Taylor Eigsti (born September 24, 1984) is an American jazz pianist and composer. Eigsti's trio features bassist Harish Raghavan and drummer Eric Harland.

concerts.label: Listen for Life Presents The Power of Eight
The New York Pops: An Evening with Chris Botti
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: I had Taylor Eigsti, Julian Lage, Grace Kelly, I’ve been really, really fortunate.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
